raw_text: how fast it was processed, there was a mistake in ordering and I had to change some menu and they didn't allow me to edit and they were unable to cancel my order it's so great that they processed so fast orders. this needs to be solve that please allow buyers to edit and have option to delete order there might be some issue or it can be order mistakenly.

be careful when you order any electronic item from this app coz I just ordered a laptop stand which cannot even hold my laptop properly and continuously loosing balance so I reached out to the customer support and told them my issue but the executive officer named vikas didn't even bother to reply just shared a message that they can't help. So whenever you are ordering any electronic item please order from Flipkart or amazon you'll get same product at cheaper price.
This is a great app. Not only does it deliver our items in less than 10 mins, it also prints doodles, creative puzzles etc., on their packages. Absolutely love it!!!

blinkit is a very good delivery app . We are very happy with it but one thing is that the prices are triple of the actual item please make the price relevant as it is very high to purchase , for example : a 10 rupees chips packet is 39 rupees please change it and your app will improve a lot . Thankyou for your service

I've had a great experience using Blinkit. The app is fast, user-friendly, and the delivery is consistently quick. The quality of the products I've received has always been excellent, with fresh groceries and well-packed items. The wide variety of products and reliable service make shopping very convenient. Thank you for maintaining such high standards—keep up the great work!

App crashing issue needs urgent fix The Blinkit app is crashing on launch. It only shows the logo and then doesn’t open at all. Because of this, the delivery partner also faced issues trying to access my order details and contact information. I really appreciate the delivery boy’s effort — he still managed to deliver despite the app problem. pleas fix the app stability. also app is stull crashing.

I had a very bad experience with Blinkit. I ordered an amount of 2300 Rs. The first time, they assigned two drivers. I selected the correct location from home, but while delivering, the driver did not find my location. I sent the location again, then one driver delivered, but the second driver asked for extra money. Both drivers were delivering the same order. This is not my fault if they are unable to find the location; this is an app glitch. I had to give extra money to this driver because I n

Excellent service! The delivery was super fast, the products were fresh, and everything arrived in perfect condition. The app is easy to use, prices are reasonable, and the delivery partner was polite and professional. A very convenient way to shop for daily essentials. Highly recommended!

The app is good, but there's one major issue. There is no option to write a custom complaint or feedback. Users are forced to choose only from predefined options, which makes it impossible to explain a different issue or share a useful suggestion. Please add a free-text feedback/complaint option so customers can properly communicate their concerns and suggestions.

Very disappointing experience. The oranges I received were rotten and completely unfit to eat. Despite reporting the issue, I received no proper resolution, and there was no way to speak to customer support. This is unacceptable for a service that claims to deliver fresh groceries. Blinkit needs to improve its quality checks and customer support. I hope this issue is taken seriously to prevent other customers from facing the same experience.

I was really happy with Blinkit's service a few days ago, but lately I'm a bit disappointed. The minimum order value for free delivery has increased to ₹500, whereas earlier it was available on orders of around ₹200, which was much more convenient. Also, many products are now frequently out of stock. Previously, almost everything I needed was available, making the service much more reliable. I hope you improve these areas and bring back the same level of convenience and efficiency.

scam alert! I received a coffee maker, but it was faulty. Water was not coming out of it. The machine kept on shaking but did not work. They refused to take it back the same day. The app showed a 7-day return on the product, but they refused to provide any service. Be aware of this scam! I sent video and photos for the proof, but they still refused.

On last Sunday at around 9:30 AM, I placed an order for confidential document printing. The order was marked as cancelled, and I was informed that a refund had been processed. Based on this information, I assumed that the documents had not been printed or delivered. However, today I was informed that the documents were, in fact, delivered to the wrong address. This is a serious breach, as the documents contained confidential information.

Should add more discounts and coupons . But I got a creative idea play a mini game and the amount of score will decide the amount of off u get. But the delivery is rapid fast like I thought guests have arrived becuz I ordered it like 5 minutes ago.

Downgraded the rating from 5 to 1. Standard have slipped. these guys are good for groceries not any other product. they don't have return policy like Amazon does. Sorry you just lost business from me. I'll rely more on Amazon now a 10 mins delivery than yours. they take action on bad quality products not like you you guys sold me a laptop stand which is a thin take item and refused to take it when I raised the quality issue immediately citin no return policy. ill be seeing you in consumer court

i like the overall experience however me and my family have faced one issue on almost every order. we mostly place order as COD. sometimes we don't have change, and neither do the delivery boy. not everyone uses online transactions much. i highly want blinkit to look into this matter and solve the inconvenience. and it honestly is a HUGE INCONVENIENCE.

I ordered groceries from Blinkit, and they cheated me twice. They delivered expired products and even sent opened/torn packages. When I requested a refund, they marked it as "Refund Successful" in the app, but the money never actually reached my bank account. I would not recommend using Blinkit. Please uninstall the app and avoid using their service.

pathetic Service and customer care team, I order one product which is remote but the problem is it is not getting sync with the TV. once I proceed with the return customer care team refuses to get the refund. I did not understand I ordered everything from blinkit and a product where there is genuinely issue withthe compatibility your team refuses to refund the amount of rs 599 ?

Dear Blinkit Team, I am extremely disappointed with my recent order experience. At the time of placing the order, I was shown a total amount of ₹61, but ₹161 was deducted from my bank account. No clear information about any additional charges, handling fees, or extra deductions was displayed before the payment was completed. This is unacceptable and appears to be misleading billing. I request an immediate investigation into this matter and a full refund of the excess amount charged from my accou

Worst experience I've ever had. Blinkit customer care is terrible. Before buying, they say "returnable, easy to return." But once you place the order, you can't cancel and you can't return the product. Worst app. I won't use it again.
